subcodes.first_line: O thou nursling at the breast of His loving-kindness! Though thou hast journeyed forth and departed from mortal sight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رضیع ثدی عنایت هر چند مسافرت نمودی و از دیده جهان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @nearness and remoteness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
